title: Student submits a completed exam
description: This verifies that a student can answer questions and submit the exam successfully from the active session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Select answers for multiple questions
Submit the exam
Verify an exam submission confirmation is visible

title: Student grants required permissions and begins the exam
description: This verifies that a student can approve webcam and screen-sharing access and proceed into the exam session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Grant webcam access when prompted
Grant screen-sharing access when prompted
Verify the active exam session is displayed

title: Student can submit the exam successfully
description: This verifies that a student can complete an active exam and submit it from the exam interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Submit the exam
Verify an exam submission confirmation is visible
Verify the active exam session ends

title: Student logs in and reaches the student dashboard
description: This verifies that a student can sign in with valid credentials and land on the student dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Administrator logs in and reaches the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an administrator can sign in with valid credentials and land on the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with admin
Fill in the password field with admin123
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Student can log in and start an exam
description: This verifies that a student can sign in, reach the student dashboard, view available exams, and start an exam successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Verify the exam session is displayed
Verify available questions are displayed

title: Student starts an exam from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a student can begin an exam session from the dashboard and enter the active exam experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Verify the active exam session is displayed

title: Student can grant monitoring permissions and continue the exam
description: This verifies that a student can allow webcam and screen-sharing access when starting an exam and proceed into the active exam session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Verify the exam session remains active
Verify the webcam monitoring view is displayed

title: Administrator can log in and view summary stats
description: This verifies that an administrator can sign in and land on the admin dashboard where summary statistics are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with admin
Fill in the password field with admin123
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify summary statistics are displayed

title: Student can answer a question and move forward
description: This verifies that a student can select an answer and continue to the next question while keeping progress in the exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Select an answer choice for the current question
Move to the next question
Verify the next question is displayed
Verify the selected answer remains recorded

title: Admin reviews summary statistics on the dashboard
description: This verifies that an administrator can access the dashboard and view summary statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with admin
Fill in the password field with admin123
Submit the login form
Verify summary statistics are displayed
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Student views available exams on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a logged-in student can see the available exam list on the student dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Verify available exams are displayed
Verify the student dashboard is displayed

title: Student can navigate back to review a previous question
description: This verifies that a student can return to an earlier question during an active exam and see the previously answered state preserved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Select an answer choice for the current question
Move to the next question
Move to the previous question
Verify the previous question is displayed
Verify the earlier answer remains recorded

title: Student navigates between questions and marks one for review
description: This verifies that a student can move through questions, mark a question for review, and preserve that state within the exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Select an answer for the current question
Click the next question control
Click the previous question control
Mark the current question for review
Verify question navigation is preserved within the exam
Verify a marked-for-review state is visible

title: Student can mark a question for review
description: This verifies that a student can flag a question for later review while taking the exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Mark the current question for review
Verify the question is marked for review
Verify the exam remains in progress

title: Student can jump to a question from the grid
description: This verifies that a student can open the question grid and jump directly to a different question during the exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the exam start action for an available exam
Allow camera access
Allow screen sharing access
Open the question grid
Jump to a specific question from the grid
Verify the selected question is displayed
Verify the question grid remains usable

title: Student jumps directly to a question from the question grid
description: This verifies that a student can use the question grid to navigate directly to a chosen question during an exam.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Open the question grid
Click a different question in the grid
Verify the selected question is displayed

title: Student login rejects a wrong-role account
description: This verifies that a student cannot access the student experience with credentials for the administrator role and remains on the authentication screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with admin
Fill in the password field with admin123
Submit the login form
Verify the authentication screen remains visible
Verify a role validation error is visible

title: Student stays within the exam at navigation boundaries
description: This verifies that first and last question boundary navigation behaves safely during an active exam session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with N24H01A0317
Fill in the password field with student123
Submit the login form
Click the start exam action for an available exam
Navigate to the first question
Attempt to go to the previous question
Navigate to the last question
Attempt to go to the next question
Verify the exam remains open on a valid question
Verify boundary navigation is handled safely

title: Student login rejects invalid credentials
description: This verifies that invalid student credentials do not sign the user in and the authentication screen remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify the authentication screen remains visible
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Student stays on the login screen after invalid credentials
description: This verifies that entering invalid credentials does not sign the user in and leaves them on the authentication screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the student ID field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials
Submit the login form
Verify the authentication screen is still displayed
Verify a login error message is visible
